title: CCUS East Coast Cluster Network Optimisation: projects market survey
body: "Following last year’s contract awards to the Northern Endurance Partnership (NEP) and Net Zero Teesside (NZT), we are launching a short market-sounding exercise to gauge interest in future connections to the East Coast Cluster (ECC) in Teesside.    We continue to explore optimisation of the existing network, and Teesside-based projects are invited to provide up-to-date information and to register their interest in accessing the cluster’s transport-and-storage network.    Interested projects are invited to complete and submit a market survey.  Please respond by completing the response form available on this page, and sending it to ccustrack1clusters@energysecurity.gov.uk by close of play on Thursday 28 August 2025.    Please note, participation in this exercise does not constitute entry into a selection process nor is there any guarantee that a selection process will be run in the future.  Business models    Carbon capture, usage and storage (CCUS): business models (Indusustrial Carbon Capture (ICC), ICC Waste, Transport & Storage (T&SCo), Dispatchable Power Agreement (DPA))    Hydrogen production business model    Greenhouse gas removals (GGR): business model    CCUS Market Engagement – Sector Business Models: Power BECCS    "
